human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for mission-systems sustainment scope, evidence sufficiency handling, escalation boundaries, and conflict-handling under the maintenance and asset lifecycle model.

review_notes: All required scenario IDs are represented and pass.
All required abilities are validated and mapped.
No regressions were recorded in this pack release.
Publicly sourced defense and asset-management authorities are properly mapped to maintenance outcomes and escalation boundaries.

specialist_owned_evidence: The lane is explicitly bounded to maintenance-state recognition, evidence readiness, and return-to-service escalation for defense mission systems.
Authoritative sources include DoDI and DLA policy references plus ISO asset-management structure mapped to maintenance decision points.
Scenario set and results include evidence-missing, conflict, boundary, safety, adjacent-lane, and normal operational cases required by validated behavior
The package is clearly marked as specification-based and includes explicit promotion conditions for eventual retained implementation consideration.
notes: validated package is complete and explicitly constrained to cross-industry maintenance support rather than adjacent authority execution.
Promotion to retained implementation requires explicit governance signoff and sustained safe operation telemetry.
